paragraphs.text: These values come from aqueous SRD‑46 records, mostly around **20–25 °C** and **ionic strengths in the ~0.1–0.5/1 M range**. A useful chemical takeaway is that **multidentate aminopolycarboxylates and macrocyclic tetraacetates bind La³⁺ far more strongly than simple dicarboxylic acids**, because La³⁺ strongly favors **high coordination number and chelation**.

claims.text: These values come from aqueous SRD‑46 records
A useful chemical takeaway is that
multidentate aminopolycarboxylates and macrocyclic tetraacetates bind La³⁺ far more strongly than simple dicarboxylic acids
because La³⁺ strongly favors **high coordination number and chelation**
